games.name: Whimsy Workshop
games.description: Step inside the Whimsy Workshop, a playful world where every toy follows the rules of physics&amp;mdash;and sometimes breaks them in surprising ways! Stack, topple, bounce, and roll your way through fun challenges as you experiment with blocks, balls, cars, and more. With realistic physics and endless possibilities, no two play sessions are ever the same. Build towering creations, set up chain reactions, or just enjoy the delightful chaos when everything comes crashing down. Perfect for players of all ages, Whimsy Workshop is a sandbox of creativity, curiosity, and toybox fun. Are you ready to play, build, and discover the magic of physics-driven to
games.instructions: Use Mouse Touch to place the objects

games.name: hexa master
games.description: Hexa Master Dive into the colorful world of Hexa Master, a dazzling hexagonal match-puzzle game that&amp;rsquo;s perfect for your next gaming fix! Rotate clusters of glowing dots, match three or more, and unleash chain reactions to clear each level. Hundreds of Levels &amp;ndash; Every stage brings new challenges and surprises. Vibrant Visuals &amp;ndash; Stunning graphics and smooth animations make the gameplay a treat for the eyes. Easy to Learn, Hard to Master &amp;ndash; Tap or click to rotate the hexagon; plan moves to get higher scores and bonuses. Relax or Compete &amp;ndash; Play to unwind, or sharpen your strategy to beat your high score. thanks for playing
games.instructions: mouse

games.name: BlockCraft Together
games.description: This game can be played both in pairs and alone. You can get resources, defeat mobs, travel across dimensions, build whatever you want, craft armor, weapons and tools, hunt, cook, and much more. Conquer the vast game world and fight the legendary Warden!
games.instructions: For mobile devices control using graphic buttons located on the screen For Desktop Player 1 Controls W and S keys to move A and D keys to rotate Space key to jump F key to attack E key to aim Q key to change item R key to open inven

games.name: DontMove
games.description: Dont move. There is an npc in the game who turns around. When he stands over and sees you moving, the machine gunner beside him will shoot you dead. Its super exciting. Give it a try.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Pro Sliding Puzzle
games.description: Slide Puzzle is a classic logic game where you must slide numbered tiles on a grid to arrange them in the correct order. Use strategy and planning to solve the puzzle and win!
games.instructions: Mouse or Touch

games.name: Dino Rush
games.description: Get ready for an exciting adventure with our cute dino! Dino Rush is a fun and easy-to-play arcade game where you help a light-blue dinosaur run and jump over obstacles. The gameplay is simple but full of challenges, and the more you play, the faster and more thrilling it becomes! Perfect for all ages, featuring smooth cartoon graphics and a retro arcade vibe. Test your skills, aim for the highest score, and challenge your friends!
games.instructions: Jump Space or Touch

games.name: Marble Zuma Shooter
games.description: Marble Zumar is a thrilling marble shooter game that will keep you hooked for hours! Blast colorful balls into the rolling chain, match three or more of the same color, and clear them before they reach the end of the track. With fast-paced action, beautifully designed levels, and smooth controls, Marble Zumar delivers an addictive puzzle experience for players of all ages. Sharpen your reflexes, plan your shots carefully, and challenge yourself through increasingly difficult stages. Can you stop the marbles in time? Play now and become the ultimate Marble Zumar master!
games.instructions: tap to shoot

games.name: Aha World Dream Town
games.description: Welcome to Aha World Dream Town, a casual life simulation game online. Whether you are an enthusiast of simulator games or just a casual player looking for relaxation online, do not miss this chance to experience a different world from your real life. Aha World Dream Town offers plenty of scenes, including supermarkets, restaurants, shops, and the game center. Traverse various charming settings and create new characters.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Physics: Electro Magnetism Quiz
games.description: Check out this Physics: Electro-magnetism quiz from Immanitas. This is good for students or educators who just want a quiz test of their basic knowledge of this topic of Physics. Winning-streak is taken account of!
games.instructions: Select the CORRECT option

games.name: Foodies 2048
games.description: Enter the bright and tasty world of &amp;ldquo;2048 Foodies&amp;rdquo; &amp;mdash; a casual 2048-style puzzle with fruits and berries! Merge identical berries and fruits to create new, juicier, and more delicious sweets. Every merge brings you closer to rare and exotic treats. Simple, intuitive controls make this merge game perfect for everyone: just connect matching items and watch new fruits appear. Colorful, vibrant graphics, smooth animations, and a mouth-watering design create an addictive fruity merge experience.
games.instructions: ldquo 2048 Foodies rdquo offers 3 control schemes for any device swipe on mobile hold and drag with the right mouse button or use W A S D or arrow keys All controls are quick responsive and intuitive letting you focus on merging fruits unlock

games.name: Pic Pie Wonders
games.description: Pic Pie Wonders&amp;rdquo; is a delightful photo puzzle game where each level presents a round picture broken into pieshaped pieces. Swap two adjacent pieces by swiping with your finger or mouse, and keep rearranging them until the photo is complete.
games.instructions: Click and hold or swipe your finger on a pie piece then drag to an adjacent piece to swap them Keep swapping until you complete the round photo

games.name: Fruit Merge 2048 &amp;ndash; Juicy Puzzle
games.description: Fruit Merge 2048 is a fun and addictive puzzle game that combines the classic 2048 gameplay with colorful, mouth-watering fruits! Simply swipe to merge identical fruits and watch them evolve into bigger, juicier ones. The more you merge, the closer you get to the ultimate fruit! Featuring bright graphics, smooth animations, and satisfying gameplay, this fruit puzzle is perfect for casual players and puzzle lovers of all ages. Whether you want to challenge your brain, pass the time, or just enjoy some juicy fun, Fruit Merge 2048 is your go-to choice.
games.instructions: Use arrow keys or swipe to move tiles Combine matching fruits to create new ones

games.name: Little Princess Dress Up
games.description: This is a fashion dress-up game for girls. If you like to dress up virtual dolls, we have a game you cant miss. The game offers a wide range of styles of gorgeous outfits and accessories for you to choose from, so you will be overwhelmed.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Dont Tease Me
games.description: Don&amp;rsquo;t Tease Me is a survival game where dodging is your only defense. Avoid balls, grab ghost pickups to vanish, and see how long you can stay masked. No fighting back&amp;mdash;just pure evasion!
games.instructions: Use WASD Keys or Left Mouse Click or Touch to control the character to avoid the incoming stones

games.name: Maths for Standard II
games.description: Add the numbers and choose the correct option. This is simple maths game for giving puzzles to students who are below or in Standard 2nd. This just asks students to choose from 4 options out of which one option is CORRECT!
games.instructions: Click to choose an option out of 4 options

games.name: CutePanckake
games.description: Take the cake out of the pan and stack it at the bottom. The more you stack, the easier it is to pour over. Choosing the right position is very crucial. See how much you can stack
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Basic Physics Single Choice
games.description: This is a single-choice correct Physics quiz where each question is knockout and timed. Time over, you lose. Single incorrect reply and you lose too! So plan and play! This game is a quick test of your knowledge.
games.instructions: Click on the correct answer

games.name: Basic Economics Multiple choice
games.description: This is a game which prepares Standard Xth to University students for a fast-paced quiz based knowledge testing on Economics where each question is timed and one incorrect answer leaves you failed. Choose 1 of 4 choices!
games.instructions: Click tap on the CORRECT choice

games.name: Maths for Standard V
games.description: This is a game designed for school children from Std. 3-5, who should be able to add numbers till 100 and multiply/divide numbers till 10. 4 options per question and 1 is CORRECT, choose that one. Any wrong answers or time over, restarts the game!
games.instructions: Click or tap on the CORRECT option

games.name: Feed Monster Game
games.description: Wander through an endless maze collecting glowing dots to boost your score while staying ahead of the hungry creatures lurking around. Grab an energizer and turn the tables, chasing monsters for extra points. Feed Monster offers a twist on the classic arcade vibe, keeping every run unpredictable and exciting for players who love a challenge.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: LiftBreak
games.description: Seize the opportunity to control the elevator to stop falling, avoid hitting obstacles, and reach the bottom to clear the level. The game features multiple levels. Come and take on the challenge
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Simple Flappy Ball
games.description: Step into the thrilling world of Simple Flappy Ball, where precise timing and quick reflexes are the keys to survival! Control a small, bouncy ball as it maneuvers within a rotating arena filled with dangerous obstacles. The ball must stay in motion, constantly jumping between the inner safe zone and the outer rotating bars. A perfectly timed jump propels the ball outward, while missing a jump causes it to fall toward the center &amp;mdash; and colliding with the inner circle or the spinning outer bars ends the game instantly. Challenge yourself to master the delicate balance of flapping to avoid danger while surviving as long as possible in this endl
games.instructions: Click tap to jump away from center avoid collision else you die

games.name: Sudoku Vault
games.description: Sudoku Vault is a logic-based puzzle game featuring 4x4, 6x6, and 9x9 boards &amp;mdash; each with four difficulty levels: Basic, Normal, Hard, and Expert. Whether youre a beginner or an expert, every grid offers a fresh challenge for your mind. Use smart NOTES to keep track of possibilities, and when you want to check your progress, tap the CHECK button &amp;mdash; it will remove incorrect inputs and lock the correct ones, helping you stay focused on the solution. With clean design and intuitive controls, Sudoku Vault is the perfect blend of relaxation and brain training.
games.instructions: Use a mouse or touchpad to select a cell then choose a number from the on-screen number pad to fill it in Use the Note button to toggle pencil marks and tap Check to validate your entries mdash incorrect numbers are removed and correct ones are lock

games.name: Space Adventure Fun Game
games.description: This is a fun, casual space game. Collect as much gold as possible and earn points. I wish everyone who plays the game good luck. You can also use the gold you collect to customize your spaceship. I hope you enjoy the game.
games.instructions: Mobile Click Rigth Button and go to rigth click left button and go to left Pc mouse left click go to left and mouse rigth click go to rigth

games.name: Krashen
games.description: Krashen &amp;ndash; Stack, Smash, and Conquer! Think you&amp;rsquo;ve got perfect timing? Krashen will put your reflexes to the ultimate test. Your mission is simple, but dangerously addictive: Tap at the perfect moment to stack falling blocks on top of each other. Miss the alignment, and the overhanging piece gets sliced away. With each mistake, your tower shrinks&amp;hellip; until there&amp;rsquo;s nothing left! The higher you stack, the faster and more intense the challenge becomes. Can you stay calm under pressure and build a skyscraper that scrapes the sky?
games.instructions: Click or Tap the screen to place the blocks

games.name: Dr. Parking 2
games.description: Ready to test your parking skills? Welcome to Dr. Parking - the super addictive car simulation game designed for all the boys who love a true driving challenge. In the game, you will drive various types of vehicles. Traverse the obstacle-laden parking lot and change corners and park your car precisely in the designated spot. And keep an eye out for keys. Each level is a test of your precision, patience, and driving instinct.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: TapSync Blocks
games.description: Get ready to test your timing and reflexes in TapSync Blocks! In this vibrant arcade challenge, your goal is to tap at just the right moment to match the moving color with the central block. Each correct match earns you points, but a single wrong move costs you a life. With only 3 lives per round, precision is key! As the game speeds up, can you keep your cool and maintain perfect sync?
games.instructions: Click at the time where matching block is around

games.name: Veggie Slice
games.description: Veggie Slice is an arcade slicing game where you slice vegetables with precision and avoid deadly dynamites. Earn high scores by chaining perfect combos. The game features endless mode with progressive difficulty, combo bonuses, and special veggies that boost your score. Miss three veggies, and it&amp;rsquo;s game over! With colorful visuals and smooth mouse or touch controls, its a fun challenge for all ages on both desktop and mobile.
games.instructions: Mouse Click and drag Touch Swipe to slice

games.name: Click_Crates
games.description: Step into the action in this fun and fast-paced 3D skill game! Your goal is simple: tap and destroy the crates before they disappear &amp;mdash; but stay sharp, the difficulty increases as you go! Test your reflexes across 3 difficulty levels: Easy, Normal, and Hard Improve your focus and reaction time Compete for the best score &amp;mdash; can you beat your high score? Optimized for desktop and mobile WebGL play Includes dynamic sound effects for better experience Perfect for casual players who love a challenge. Try it now and see how far you can go
games.instructions: Mouse Click ndash Destroy crates Menu Navigation ndash Use mouse to select difficulty retry or navigate menus Works on Desktop WebGL

games.name: Water Sort Legend
games.description: Water Sort Legend is a brain-teasing puzzle game with a twist of fun, coins, and challenge! Sort colored water into the right tubes &amp;mdash; test your logic, improve your IQ, and unlock new levels as you go! With over 150 handcrafted levels across Easy, Medium, and Hard difficulties, players will never run out of puzzles to solve. Features: Level Unlock System &amp;ndash; Beat a level to unlock the next! IQ Estimator &amp;ndash; Get a smartness score based on your moves! Coins &amp;amp; Currency System &amp;ndash; Earn coins for every win. Upgrade Shop &amp;ndash; Spend coins on helpful boosters: Extra Tube Coin Booster Color Helper Sound FX &amp;ndash; Clean sounds
games.instructions: Desktop Click on a tube to select it Click on another tube to pour the water if allowed Use your mouse to play ndash no keyboard needed Mobile Tap on a tube to select Tap on another tube to pour water Fully optimized for touch controls

games.name: Pretty Sheep Run
games.description: Play a fun arcade game in Pretty Sheep Run. You guide an adorable little sheep dashing across endless platforms. Keep your sheep running while cleverly avoiding dangerous traps. Control your sheep running to shoot different numbered doors. Change the numbers into positive numbers. Thus increasing the guns DMG, ATK SPD, etc.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Choco Draw
games.description: Welcome to Choco Draw, the sweetest twist on classic card games! In this candy-themed challenge, each card is marked with delicious treats &amp;mdash; from gummies and lollipops to chocolate bars and bonbons. Match, draw, and strategize your way through sugary showdowns where luck meets logic. Whether youre collecting sets or bluffing your way to victory, every draw is a bite-sized surprise. Ready to outsmart your opponents in this candy-coated card game?
games.instructions: Poker Game Enjoy

games.name: Creep Crushers
games.description: Step into the spooky showdown of Creep Crusher! Halloween horrors are closing in, and your only defense is your lightning-fast clicking skills. Tap repeatedly to smash ghouls, banish ghosts, and squash creepy creatures before they get too close. Every enemy you crush keeps you safe a little longer, but as the night deepens, the creeps come faster and in greater numbers. Can you survive the haunting onslaught and become the ultimate Halloween hero?
games.instructions: Click on the pumpkins

games.name: Yolk Patrol
games.description: Welcome to Yolk Patrol &amp;mdash; the ultimate egg-saving mission! Eggs are falling fast from both sides, and its your job to catch them before they crack. Stay sharp, move swiftly, and don&amp;rsquo;t let a single shell hit the ground. But be careful &amp;mdash; only a few mistakes are allowed before your patrol ends. Can you keep every egg safe and prove youre the top yolk defender?
games.instructions: Click on either side of man to change direction of collecting eggs click 1 or 2 times

games.name: Geo Champs
games.description: Get ready to shape up with Geo Champs! Designed for young learners aged 5 to 8, this fun and educational game helps kids recognize and identify basic geometric shapes in an interactive way. From circles and squares to triangles and more, children will boost their visual learning and shape recognition skills while playing through colorful levels. With cheerful visuals and simple gameplay, every young player can become a true geometry champion!
games.instructions: Guess the correct shape and click on the right option

games.name: Fish Merge
games.description: Dive into the ultimate Fish Merge - Under Water! Experience the fun of merging colorful fish in addictive pattern. Enjoy relaxing underwater effects and soothing visuals as you combine similar items to unlock surprises and boost your score. Perfect for casual gamers of all ages, this game blends strategy, fun, and calming ocean vibes.
games.instructions: Merge Drag matching fish together to combine them Score Higher-level fish give more points and coins Unlock Keep merging to discover rare fish

games.name: Marble Snap: Color Puzzle Game
games.description: Marble Snap is an addictive and relaxing logic puzzle game designed to test your brain and sharpen your thinking skills. Match, place, and arrange marbles on the board to solve each level. With smooth controls, colorful 3D graphics, and satisfying animations, every move feels rewarding. Challenge yourself through hundreds of mind-teasing levels that start easy but grow more complex, keeping you hooked for hours. Perfect for fans of casual puzzle games, match-and-place challenges, and brain-training games. Play at your own pace&amp;mdash;no time pressure, just pure puzzle fun. Whether you want a quick mental workout or a long, relaxing session.
games.instructions: Mouse Click and drag to connect matching marble balls

games.name: Friday Night Funkin Unblocked
games.description: Friday Night Funkin Unblocked is a wildly popular casual arcade music game where you can immerse yourself in the crazy beats and supercharged duels. Tap the arrows in sync with the beats to nail every note and stay on rhythm! Face off against all kinds of funky foes. The pace is getting faster and the challenges more exciting! Super original beats and music tracks, let you get addicted to FNFs unique sound tour world!
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Vemon Run 3D
games.description: Vemon Run 3D brings a fun arcade running game. Step into a vivid 3D platform world. You become the nimble Vemon, racing forward and avoiding obstacles in a thrilling running adventure. Flexibly move your character to dodge left and right, and sprint at breakneck speeds! Keep collecting more gems to upgrade your character. Pass through positive-numbered doors. Destroy enemies to gain upgrades and transform into a superhero!
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Burst It Right
games.description: Get ready for a colorful popping challenge in Burst It Right! Your task is to guide drifting balloons into position and pop them using matching-colored pins. Accuracy is key &amp;mdash; only a correct color match will burst the balloon, while mismatches count as failures. With limited chances and increasing speed, your timing and strategy will be put to the test. Can you keep up the popping streak and master the art of precision bursting?
games.instructions: Push pin to right color direction

games.name: Smash Sprout
games.description: Get your hammer ready and dive into the whacky world of Smash Sprout! Moles are popping up left and right, and it&amp;rsquo;s your job to thump them back into their holes with perfect timing. Each well-aimed hit boosts your score, but miss too many, and it&amp;rsquo;s game over! With fast-paced action, limited chances, and an ever-growing mole invasion, only the quickest reflexes will rise to the top. Can you smash your way to victory?
games.instructions: Smash the coming Sprout using Hammer just click on it

games.name: Scary Maze 7
games.description: Do you enjoy the rush of a good scare? Online games that test your courage have a special pull. The scary maze genre stands out, pushing players to their limits. Scary Maze 7 is the newest version of this well-known and often dreaded experience. It offers a fresh take on the classic internet maze game.

games.name: Thung Thung Sahur Merge Forever
games.description: Thung Thung Sahur Merge Forever is a merge game without afraid of game over, merge all italian brainrot with no hesitate, enjoy your time

games.name: Kitty Merge Tycoon
games.description: Step into a cozy world where merging fluffy kittens leads to pure joy. In Kitty Merge Tycoon, your goal is to combine identical kitties to unlock new, even cuter companions. Watch as your collection grows into a purring empire of whiskers and wonder. Tap to spawn more fluffballs, discover rare breeds, and rise through the ranks to become the ultimate feline tycoon. The charm never ends!

games.name: Lost Adventure
games.description: Survivors of a mid-air crash find themselves in a mysterious land. The pilot, amidst crafting, mining, and solving puzzles, works tirelessly to save passengers stranded on separate islands in the wild grass. Can they conquer the challenges, reunite, and escape the enigmatic realm before the unknown dangers lurking in the wilderness engulf them all? Embark on a thrilling adventure after a plane crash strands you in a mysterious, wild land. As the pilot, you must gather resources from wreckage, craft tools, and navigate through the wild grass to rescue scattered passengers on small islands.
games.instructions: Desktop Controls W uarr Up Arrow Move forward S darr Down Arrow Move backward A larr Left Arrow Move left D rarr Right Arrow Move right Mobile Controls On-Screen Joystick Move in all directions by dragging the joystick

games.name: Bid Wars 1  Auction Simulator
games.description: Ever dreamed of becoming a smart and fearless auction tycoon? Bid Wars 1: Auction Simulator is an addictive auction and simulation game that puts you in exciting bidding wars to uncover hidden treasures! In this game, you join intense auctions for storage units, antiques, and mysterious items. Spot valuable gems, bid wisely, and sell them for huge profits!

games.description: Welcome to Girl Games Unblocked: Mini Fun, a collection of minigames online. Whether you are a casual player looking for relaxation or a skillful gamer who wants to elevate your gaming skills, we will satisfy your needs with our vast number of relaxing games. Find your favorite minigame among our best girl game selection. Fashion design, nail salon, doll dressup games, food cooking... You can always find something that fits your type!

Test your spatial awareness and hand-eye coordination by following complex outlines in a fully interactive 3D environment. With satisfying visuals and brain-teasing levels, this puzzle game offers engaging gameplay for fans of drawing games, brain training, and 3D puzzles. Challenge your focus and accuracy as you complete each level with perfect lines.

games.description: Move the colored blocks out of the exits of the same color. The game has multiple levels, and various items will randomly appear in each level to enhance the fun of the gameplay. Give it a try.
